ucs.title: [LLM] Conti / Wizard Spider AdFind AD reconnaissance per leaked playbook
ucs.description: Hunts the verbatim AdFind LDAP-filter chain prescribed by the August 2021 leaked Conti operator playbook (used by Wizard Spider / UNC1878 / FIN12). Operators run AdFind to dump users, computers, OUs, groups, subnets and domain trusts within minutes of obtaining a foothold — well before lateral movement begins.
ucs.splunk: | tstats `summariesonly` count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmd values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parent FROM datamodel=Endpoint.Processes WHERE (Processes.process_name="adfind.exe" OR Processes.process="*adfind*") AND (Processes.process="*objectcategory=person*" OR Processes.process="*objectcategory=computer*" OR Processes.process="*objectcategory=organizationalUnit*" OR Processes.process="*objectcategory=group*" OR Processes.process="*trustdmp*" OR Processes.process="* -subnets *" OR Processes.process="* -gcb *") BY Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.process_name | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | rename firstTime as first_time lastTime as last_time | eval recon_flags=mvcount(split(cmd,"adfind"))-1 | where recon_flags>=2 OR match(cmd,"trustdmp")
ucs.kql:
// Conti playbook AdFind chain — flag a host running >=2 distinct AdFind invocations
// with playbook-specific LDAP filters inside a 30-minute window, OR any single
// invocation that pulls the trust dump (`-sc trustdmp`).
let PlaybookFlags = dynamic([
    "objectcategory=person",
    "objectcategory=computer",
    "objectcategory=organizationalUnit",
    "objectcategory=group",
    "trustdmp",
    "-subnets",
    "-gcb"
]);
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where AccountName !endswith "$"
| where (FileName =~ "adfind.exe" or FileName =~ "adfind64.exe")
     or (InitiatingProcessFileName in~ ("cmd.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe")
         and ProcessCommandLine has "adfind")
| where ProcessCommandLine has_any (PlaybookFlags)
| extend HasTrustDump = tobool(ProcessCommandLine has "trustdmp")
| summarize InvocationCount = count(),
            FlagsSeen = make_set(extract(@"(?i)(objectcategory=\w+|trustdmp|-subnets|-gcb)", 1, ProcessCommandLine)),
            SampleCmds = make_set(ProcessCommandLine, 6),
            ParentChain = make_set(InitiatingProcessFileName, 4),
            FirstSeen = min(Timestamp),
            LastSeen  = max(Timestamp),
            AnyTrustDump = max(HasTrustDump)
            by DeviceName, AccountName, bin(Timestamp, 30m)
| where InvocationCount >= 2 or AnyTrustDump == true
| order by LastSeen desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// Sentinel port — process-create via SecurityEvent 4688
// Requires 'Include command line in process creation events' GPO.
let PlaybookFlags = dynamic([
    "objectcategory=person",
    "objectcategory=computer",
    "objectcategory=organizationalUnit",
    "objectcategory=group",
    "trustdmp",
    "-subnets",
    "-gcb"
]);
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where EventID == 4688
| where AccountType == "User" and Account !endswith "$"
| where (NewProcessName endswith "\\adfind.exe" or NewProcessName endswith "\\adfind64.exe")
     or (ParentProcessName has_any ("cmd.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe") and CommandLine has "adfind")
| where CommandLine has_any (PlaybookFlags)
| extend HasTrustDump = tobool(CommandLine has "trustdmp")
| summarize InvocationCount = count(),
            FlagsSeen   = make_set(extract(@"(?i)(objectcategory=\w+|trustdmp|-subnets|-gcb)", 1, CommandLine)),
            SampleCmds  = make_set(CommandLine, 6),
            ParentChain = make_set(ParentProcessName, 4),
            FirstSeen   = min(TimeGenerated),
            LastSeen    = max(TimeGenerated),
            AnyTrustDump = max(HasTrustDump)
            by Computer, Account, bin(TimeGenerated, 30m)
| where InvocationCount >= 2 or AnyTrustDump == true
| order by LastSeen desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: Conti / Wizard Spider AdFind AD Recon (Leaked Playbook)
id: 9a23c8c7-1f6d-4b6a-a4cf-7fd2a0c0c3aa
status: stable
description: |
  Detects AdFind execution carrying LDAP filters and switches verbatim from the
  August 2021 leaked Conti / Wizard Spider operator playbook (UNC1878 / FIN12).
  Cluster of >=2 hits per host/user/30min is highly indicative of hands-on-keyboard recon.
references:
  - https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G0102/
  - https://thedfirreport.com/2021/05/12/conti-ransomware/
author: SOC Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/13
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_img:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\adfind.exe'
      - '\adfind64.exe'
  selection_cmd:
    CommandLine|contains: 'adfind'
  selection_flags:
    CommandLine|contains:
      - 'objectcategory=person'
      - 'objectcategory=computer'
      - 'objectcategory=organizationalUnit'
      - 'objectcategory=group'
      - 'trustdmp'
      - '-subnets'
      - '-gcb'
  filter_machine_acct:
    User|endswith: '$'
  condition: (selection_img or selection_cmd) and selection_flags and not filter_machine_acct
falsepositives:
  - Authorized AD enumeration with the same flag set (uncommon outside red-team / Conti tradecraft)
level: high
tags:
  - attack.discovery
  - attack.t1087.002
  - attack.t1018
  - attack.t1482
  - attack.t1069.002
  - attack.g0102
ucs.rationale: AdFind is a known sysadmin tool, but the exact filter strings (`objectcategory=organizationalUnit`, `-sc trustdmp`, `-gcb`, `-subnets`) come directly from the Conti playbook leaked by `m1Geelka` in Aug 2021. Wizard Spider / UNC1878 / FIN12 operators copy-paste these as a batch within ~5 minutes of beacon callback. Random APTs rarely use AdFind at all (most prefer BloodHound or PowerView), and beni

ucs.title: [LLM] Conti / Wizard Spider Rclone exfiltration to MEGA/pCloud pre-encryption
ucs.description: Hunts the canonical Conti double-extortion exfil step: Rclone bulk-copying file shares to MEGA or pCloud immediately before encryption. The Conti playbook prescribes Rclone with explicit `mega:` / `pcloud:` remotes and high `--transfers` parallelism — also seen used by DarkSide/BlackMatter affiliates that overlap with Wizard Spider personnel.
ucs.splunk: | tstats `summariesonly` count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmd values(Processes.parent_process_name) as parent values(Processes.process_path) as path FROM datamodel=Endpoint.Processes WHERE (Processes.process_name="rclone.exe" OR Processes.process="*rclone*") AND (Processes.process="*mega:*" OR Processes.process="*pcloud:*" OR Processes.process="*mega.nz*" OR Processes.process="*mega.io*" OR Processes.process="*--transfers*" OR Processes.process="* copy *" OR Processes.process="* sync *") AND Processes.user!="*$" BY Processes.dest Processes.user Processes.process_name | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | rename firstTime as first_time lastTime as last_time | join type=left dest [ | tstats `summariesonly` count as mega_conns values(All_Traffic.dest_ip) as mega_ips FROM datamodel=Network_Traffic.All_Traffic WHERE (All_Traffic.dest_category="cloud_storage" OR All_Traffic.dest="*mega.nz*" OR All_Traffic.dest="*mega.io*" OR All_Traffic.dest="*userstorage.mega.co.nz*" OR All_Traffic.dest="*pcloud.com*") BY All_Traffic.src | rename All_Traffic.src as dest ]
ucs.kql:
// Conti/Wizard Spider exfil — rclone.exe with MEGA/pCloud remote, optionally
// correlated with same-host network egress to MEGA infrastructure within 30 min.
let ExfilDestinations = dynamic([
    "mega:", "MEGA:", "pcloud:", "pCloud:",
    "mega.nz", "mega.io", "mega.co.nz", "pcloud.com"
]);
let RcloneVerbs = dynamic([" copy "," sync "," copyto "," move "]);
let RcloneProcs = DeviceProcessEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(7d)
    | where AccountName !endswith "$"
    | where (FileName =~ "rclone.exe")
         or (InitiatingProcessFileName =~ "rclone.exe")
         or (ProcessCommandLine has "rclone" and ProcessCommandLine has_any (RcloneVerbs))
    | where ProcessCommandLine has_any (ExfilDestinations)
         or ProcessCommandLine has "--transfers"
    | project ProcTime = Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName, AccountName,
              FileName, FolderPath, ProcessCommandLine,
              InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
              SHA256;
let MegaNet = DeviceNetworkEvents
    | where Timestamp > ago(7d)
    | where RemoteUrl has_any ("mega.nz","mega.io","mega.co.nz","userstorage.mega","pcloud.com")
         or InitiatingProcessFileName =~ "rclone.exe"
    | project NetTime = Timestamp, DeviceId, RemoteIP, RemoteUrl, RemotePort,
              InitiatingProcessFileName;
RcloneProcs
| join kind=leftouter MegaNet on DeviceId
| where isnull(NetTime) or NetTime between (ProcTime - 5m .. ProcTime + 30m)
| summarize NetHits = countif(isnotempty(RemoteUrl)),
            MegaUrls = make_set(RemoteUrl, 10),
            Cmds = make_set(ProcessCommandLine, 5),
            Parents = make_set(InitiatingProcessFileName, 5),
            FirstSeen = min(ProcTime), LastSeen = max(ProcTime)
            by DeviceName, AccountName
| order by LastSeen desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// Sentinel port — process-create via SecurityEvent 4688 + network egress via CommonSecurityLog.
let ExfilDestinations = dynamic([
    "mega:", "pcloud:", "mega.nz", "mega.io", "mega.co.nz", "pcloud.com"
]);
let RcloneVerbs = dynamic([" copy "," sync "," copyto "," move "]);
let RcloneProcs = SecurityEvent
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
    | where EventID == 4688
    | where AccountType == "User" and Account !endswith "$"
    | where NewProcessName endswith "\\rclone.exe"
         or (ParentProcessName has_any ("cmd.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe") and CommandLine has "rclone")
    | where CommandLine has_any (ExfilDestinations)
         or CommandLine has "--transfers"
         or CommandLine has_any (RcloneVerbs)
    | project ProcTime = TimeGenerated, Computer, Account, NewProcessName, CommandLine, ParentProcessName;
let MegaNet = CommonSecurityLog
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
    | where DestinationHostName has_any ("mega.nz","mega.io","mega.co.nz","userstorage.mega","pcloud.com")
         or RequestURL has_any ("mega.nz","mega.io","mega.co.nz","pcloud.com")
    | project NetTime = TimeGenerated, Computer = SourceHostName,
              DestinationHostName, DestinationIP, RequestURL, RequestClientApplication;
RcloneProcs
| join kind=leftouter MegaNet on Computer
| where isnull(NetTime) or NetTime between (ProcTime - 5m .. ProcTime + 30m)
| summarize NetHits = countif(isnotempty(DestinationHostName)),
            MegaDsts = make_set(DestinationHostName, 10),
            Cmds = make_set(CommandLine, 5),
            Parents = make_set(ParentProcessName, 5),
            FirstSeen = min(ProcTime), LastSeen = max(ProcTime)
            by Computer, Account
| order by LastSeen desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: Conti / Wizard Spider Rclone Exfiltration to MEGA / pCloud
id: 4d3b7a92-5c9e-4a3b-bd17-c0bb4f12c7e1
status: stable
description: |
  Detects Rclone execution targeting MEGA / pCloud cloud-storage remotes — the
  canonical pre-encryption exfil step in the Conti / Wizard Spider playbook
  (also re-used by DarkSide / BlackMatter affiliates with operator overlap).
references:
  - https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G0102/
  - https://thedfirreport.com/2021/11/29/continuing-the-bazar-ransomware-story/
  - https://www.cisa.gov/news-events/cybersecurity-advisories/aa21-265a
author: SOC Detection Engineering
date: 2026/05/13
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_img:
    Image|endswith: '\rclone.exe'
  selection_cmd:
    CommandLine|contains: 'rclone'
  selection_dest:
    CommandLine|contains:
      - 'mega:'
      - 'pcloud:'
      - 'mega.nz'
      - 'mega.io'
      - 'mega.co.nz'
      - 'pcloud.com'
      - '--transfers'
  filter_machine_acct:
    User|endswith: '$'
  condition: (selection_img or selection_cmd) and selection_dest and not filter_machine_acct
falsepositives:
  - Sanctioned IT/backup workflows to MEGA or pCloud (rare in enterprise)
level: high
tags:
  - attack.exfiltration
  - attack.t1048.003
  - attack.t1567.002
  - attack.t1567
  - attack.g0102
ucs.rationale: Conti / Wizard Spider operators (per the leaked playbook and DFIR Report case-write-ups) standardised on Rclone with a `mega:` or `pcloud:` remote and aggressive `--transfers` parallelism to exfiltrate file shares 1-72h before deploying the ransomware payload. Rclone itself is dual-use, but the combination of (a) the specific MEGA/pCloud cloud remotes that Conti hard-coded into their playbook, (b)
